summary: The agent concludes that bacterial killing effectiveness does not increase when exposed to interfering substances because existing research provides no evidence linking such conditions to improved antimicrobial results. Instead, potential synergies between specific antiseptic blends are unrelated to interference effects and thus do not justify an affirmative claim regarding enhancing efficacy through contaminant exposure.

Answer choice: B
